hero-subtitle: Newly graduated application developer – testing tech stack & ideas.
card1-text: I am experimenting with static webspace, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
card2-text: Google Analytics integration for real-time analysis of my little playground.
about-text: Hello! I'm Zafer, a trained application developer. As a generalist, I combine web development with database expertise, agile project management, and modern AI support. Whether it's code, hardware, or workflow optimization – I'm always ready to find a solution.
disclaimer-text: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links.
game-box-text: This game is a personal hobby project of mine. I am currently developing and improving it on the side whenever I find the time.
intro-desc: On this page, I experiment with various API connections. Data is loaded in real-time from external servers, processed, and displayed dynamically:
intro-feat-facts: Bizarre and useless facts to make you smile.
intro-feat-qr: Instantly create scannable QR codes from text.
intro-feat-pets: Fetch cute and random dog or cat pictures.
guestbook-no-entries: No entries yet. Be the first!
guestbook-intro-text: Great to have you here! Feel free to leave some friendly greetings and, most importantly, your feedback about this website, the game, and all other projects here. I appreciate every entry!
intro-feat-github: Real-time feed of my coding activity.
dashboard.name: Name
dashboard.title: Game Analytics
contact-intro-desc: Whether you have questions about my projects, want to leave feedback, or are interested in collaborating – feel free to use the contact form. I will get back to you as soon as possible!
